name: modify-system-prompt
task: Update the system prompt to include information about crypto market hours. Crypto markets are 24/7 so the market-closed note on weekends should exclude crypto tickers. Add this to the buildDateContext function in prompts.ts.
assertions: The buildDateContext() function in prompts.ts is modified to mention that crypto markets trade 24/7
The weekend/holiday market-closed note is qualified to apply only to equities, not crypto
The changes are made in prompts.ts, not in service.ts or tool-defs.ts
The buildSystemPrompt function signature and its section-assembly logic remain unchanged
No existing prompt sections (BASE_PROMPT, GUIDELINES, VISUALIZATION_RULES) are removed or overwritten
